[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:NotesPayable with a value of 25,163,642 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:LiabilitiesNoncurrent is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:NotesAndLoansPayable with a value of 4,700,000 in the extension taxonomy role 00000002 - Statement - Consolidated Balance Sheets, but us-gaap:NotesPayable is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:NotesAndLoansPayable in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies. Please review the element selection to determine that an appropriate element has been used for these two line item concepts.
The properties of this us-gaap:NotesPayable fact are:
Period :2023-12-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:9278 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - favo_s1a2.htm 21793

[DQC.US.0081.9278] The line item concept us-gaap:NotesPayable with a value of 25,163,642 and a calculation parent of us-gaap:Liabilities is represented as a sibling of us-gaap:NotesAndLoansPayable with a value of 4,700,000 in the extension taxonomy role 00000007 - Statement - Condensed Consolidated Balance Sheets (Unaudited), but us-gaap:NotesPayable is represented as a descendent of us-gaap:NotesAndLoansPayable in the calculation relationships defined in the US GAAP taxonomies.
